title: Remediation

frontmatter.title: Remediation
frontmatter.description: The certifiable competency of authoring and executing safe, reversible remediation playbooks — including breach response — that resolve incidents without widening the blast radius.

body:
# Skill · Remediation

A specialty competency: the agent can author an ordered, reversible playbook of DOIL intents, execute
it under a scope budget with verification and rollback, and apply it to adversarial breach scenarios
without empowering the attacker.

## Conferred by
- [RESIL-210](../schools/incident-resilience/departments/remediation/courses/resil-210.md)
- [RESIL-310](../schools/incident-resilience/departments/security-operations/courses/resil-310.md)

## Examined by
[Incident & Resilience Exam](../benchmarks/resil-exam.md).

## Maps to certification
Required for [Incident & Resilience — Gold](../certifications/incident-resilience-gold.md). Pairs with
[Incident Response](incident-response.md) to complete the school's competency set.
